title: Numbers 21 to 100
objectives: Say your age and prices clearly
grammar_notes: 16-29 are written as ONE word: dieciséis, veintinueve.
31 and up are THREE words joined by 'y': treinta y uno, cincuenta y siete.
Use 'cien' for exactly 100; switch to 'ciento' when more digits follow (ciento uno = 101).
example_phrases: Tengo treinta y cinco años. (I'm 35 years old.)
Cuesta cuarenta y nueve euros. (It costs 49 euros.)
Hay cien personas aquí. (There are 100 people here.)
